slides.title: 導入判断は表で比較する

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>導入判断の比較表</title><desc>table schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#fbfaf7" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">導入判断の比較表</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#8f3d35" /><rect x="72" y="126" width="816" height="58" rx="18" fill="#f2ded9" stroke="#8f3d35" /><text x="96" y="162" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">評価軸</text><text x="504" y="162" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">判断材料</text><path d="M480 126v348" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><rect x="72" y="184" width="816" height="58" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="218" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">作成時間</text><text x="504" y="218" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">create_pptxで短縮</text><rect x="72" y="242" width="816" height="58" fill="#f1eee7" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="276" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">品質</text><text x="504" y="276" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">lintで担保</text><rect x="72" y="300" width="816" height="58" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="334" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">再利用</text><text x="504" y="334" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">assetsで蓄積</text><rect x="72" y="358" width="816" height="58" fill="#f1eee7" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="392" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">統制</text><text x="504" y="392" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">schemaで制御</text><rect x="72" y="416" width="816" height="58" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="450" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">統制</text><text x="504" y="450" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">schemaで制御</text></svg>

slides.title: 運用上の論点を一覧化する

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>運用設計で決めること</title><desc>list-enumeration schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#fbfaf7" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">運用設計で決めること</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#8f3d35" /><rect x="96" y="128" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="124" cy="152" r="12" fill="#f2ded9" stroke="#8f3d35" /><text x="124" y="157" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#8f3d35">1</text><text x="154" y="158" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#24211d">テンプレート管理者</text><rect x="96" y="190" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="124" cy="214" r="12" fill="#f2ded9" stroke="#8f3d35" /><text x="124" y="219" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#8f3d35">2</text><text x="154" y="220" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#24211d">許可するアイコン資産</text><rect x="96" y="252" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="124" cy="276" r="12" fill="#f2ded9" stroke="#8f3d35" /><text x="124" y="281" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#8f3d35">3</text><text x="154" y="282" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#24211d">出力レビュー基準</text><rect x="96" y="314" width="768" height="48" rx="14" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="124" cy="338" r="12" fill="#f2ded9" stroke="#8f3d35" /><text x="124" y="343" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#8f3d35">4</text><text x="154" y="344" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="600" fill="#24211d">標準導入するプロジェクト</text></svg>

slides.title: リスクと対策を同じ行で示す

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>リスクと対策</title><desc>table schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#fbfaf7" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">リスクと対策</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#8f3d35" /><rect x="72" y="126" width="816" height="58" rx="18" fill="#f2ded9" stroke="#8f3d35" /><text x="96" y="162" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">リスク</text><text x="504" y="162" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#24211d">対策</text><path d="M480 126v348" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><rect x="72" y="184" width="816" height="58" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="218" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">図形被り</text><text x="504" y="218" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">z-order正規化</text><rect x="72" y="242" width="816" height="58" fill="#f1eee7" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="276" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">文字過多</text><text x="504" y="276" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">overflow lint</text><rect x="72" y="300" width="816" height="58" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="334" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">SVG不備</text><text x="504" y="334" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">safe fill="#24211d">色の乱れ</text><text x="504" y="392" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">低彩度token</text><rect x="72" y="416" width="816" height="58" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><text x="96" y="450" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#24211d">色の乱れ</text><text x="504" y="450" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#5f5a52">低彩度token</text></svg>

sources.title: Slideland reference categories
sources.notes: Uses Slideland categories as inspiration only; visuals are generated by pptcreater presets.
